prompt: I've been building this Express API with Prisma and PostgreSQL for about 3 weeks — it handles invoice generation and PDF export for UK freelancers. Before I go deeper, I want to step back and check if I'm heading in the right direction. Are there existing tools that already do this? Am I using the right stack? /perspective

assertions.text: A perspective report markdown file exists in the outputs directory
Report contains a 'What Already Exists' section naming at least 2 competing invoice tools or services (e.g. Invoice Ninja, FreshBooks, Wave, Xero)
Report contains an 'Alternative Approaches' section with at least one alternative stack, architecture, or strategy with trade-offs
Report contains a 'Codebase Audit' section that references current documentation or version-specific info (not just general knowledge about Express/Prisma)
Report contains a recommendation section using one of the four categories: Stay the course, Adjust, Pivot, or Adopt
Report contains checkbox action items (- [ ]) that are specific enough to implement without further decisions
Report follows the skill's template structure: What You're Building, What Already Exists, Alternative Approaches, Codebase Audit, Coherency, Recommendation, Action Items — in roughly that order
